Meta.title: Minh Truong Doan — Front-end Developer
Meta.description: Front-end Developer with {years}+ years of experience leading teams and building scalable web & mobile applications with React, Next.js, Vue.js, Angular, and React Native.

Hero.name: Minh Truong Doan
Hero.tagline: I build performant, scalable web & mobile products.

About.label: About me
About.title: Crafting Front-end Systems that scale.
About.p1: I am a Front-end Developer with {years}+ years of professional experience in Web and Mobile Application Development, including {leadingYears}+ years of leading and mentoring teams of {teamMin}–{teamMax} engineers. I design scalable front-end architectures, drive technical decisions, and deliver high-quality products from concept to production.
About.p2: Highly proficient in modern front-end technologies and frameworks such as React, Angular and Vue.js, with extensive mobile development experience using React Native for both iOS and Android platforms. I focus on building performant, maintainable, and scalable applications with excellent user experience.
About.p3: I have led and contributed to complex products including e-commerce platforms, financial applications, financial trading platforms, and real-time systems. My responsibilities include system architecture design, performance optimization, real-time data handling, code quality enforcement, and cross-functional collaboration with Back-end, product, and design teams.
About.p4: I am passionate about improving engineering standards, mentoring developers, and driving continuous improvement in development processes and product quality.
About.highlightTitle: What I bring to the table

architecture.title: Scalable Architecture
architecture.desc: Module Federation, monorepos (Nx), micro-frontends, reusable design systems.

performance.title: Performance Engineering
performance.desc: Bundle splitting, lazy loading, real-time data streams, render-path optimization.

leadership.title: Team Leadership
leadership.desc: Led teams of {teamMin}–{teamMax} engineers, set coding standards, mentored juniors into seniors.

delivery.title: End-to-end Delivery
delivery.desc: From discovery to production — design, build, test, ship, observe.

Skills.label: Tech Stack
Skills.title: Tools I build with.
Skills.subtitle: Battle-tested in production across trading platforms, e-commerce, mobile apps and real-time systems.

Experience.label: Experience
Experience.title: Career Timeline
Experience.subtitle: {years} years building products. {leadingYears} years leading teams.

Projects.label: Featured projects
Projects.title: Selected Work
Projects.subtitle: A curated slice of the products I have shipped.

bitcastle-fx.name: Bitcastle FX
bitcastle-fx.summary: Global Forex trading platform powered by MetaQuotes 4/5 and AI.
bitcastle-fx.responsibilities: I led the team of 5 and owned delivery timeline. I base the project with Nx in a monorepo + micro-frontend architecture spanning Next.js and React + Vite shells with the necessary libraries; established the testing pipeline with Jest for unit tests and Playwright for E2E. Adopted an AI-assisted coding / testing / review workflow using GitHub Copilot, Claude, and other AI tools. Contributed to KYC, login, deposit, withdraw, transaction history, and other features.

bitcastle.name: Bitcastle
bitcastle.summary: Full-featured cryptocurrency exchange with real-time order book.
bitcastle.responsibilities: I led the team of 6 and owned delivery timeline. I base the project on Nuxt.js with the necessary libraries; contributed to features such as login, registration, spot trading, copy trading, order management, wallet management, deposit/withdraw, transaction history, landing page, and other features.

dentity-kyc.name: Dentity
dentity-kyc.summary: Identity authentication platform handling verifications and payments.
dentity-kyc.responsibilities: I led the team of 5 and owned delivery timeline. I base 2 apps on Next.js and React with the necessary libraries. The main site on Next.js — login, registration, KYC via a custom in-house SDK, payment via Apple Pay/PayPal/Stripe, and other features. The admin on React — login, registration, KYC record management, and other features.

yellow.name: Yellow
yellow.summary: E-commerce platform to wholesale all kinds of items in the Thai market.
yellow.responsibilities: I led a team of 8 and owned delivery timeline. I bootstrapped 3 apps and contributed to all of them. The e-commerce storefront on Next.js with the necessary libraries — seller/buyer registration and login, product detail, product listings, checkout, add-to-cart, home page, and other features. The seller console on React with the necessary libraries — inventory management, shop management, revenue analytics, shop address management, and other features. The operator admin on React with the necessary libraries — inventory, shop, home page, promotions, product management, and other features.

reddiz.name: ReddiZ
reddiz.summary: Mobile app for a Vietnamese telecommunications social network.
reddiz.responsibilities: Within a 4-engineer team on React Native, I contributed to custom layout primitives for the app, the personal profile, post creation and editing, login, registration, telecom data management, and other features for this telecom social network.

appi-team.name: APPI Team
appi-team.summary: Internal governance & work management — a French Jira-style suite.
appi-team.responsibilities: I led the team of 4 and owned delivery timeline. I base the project with Angular 11 and the necessary libraries; contributed to core features: task management, team member management, timeline management, project management, and other features for this Jira-style internal governance tool.

chubb.name: Chubb
chubb.summary: Front-end work for the world's largest publicly traded P&C insurer.
chubb.responsibilities: Within a 4-engineer team on Angular + RxJS, I built the admin side of the platform — customer management, multi-product insurance management, and other back-office features.

my-coach.name: My Coach
my-coach.summary: Personal trainer search platform for the Japanese market.
my-coach.responsibilities: In a 2-person team on Next.js, I built the project landing page along with login, registration, and other features for this Japanese personal-trainer search platform.

viecnha-24h.name: ViecNha 24H
viecnha-24h.summary: On-demand household chores delivery & pickup mobile app.
viecnha-24h.responsibilities: I base the project with React Native and the necessary libraries and built the helper-side mobile app within a 4-engineer team. Features included nearby job discovery, job management, salary/bonus tracking, profile management, authentication (login/register), and other features.

photobook-ai.name: Photobook AI
photobook-ai.summary: Upload images and generate a printed photobook in a single click.
photobook-ai.responsibilities: Within a 5-engineer team on Next.js + Redux/Redux-saga, I built the authentication (login/register), the photo frame editor, and other features supporting the one-click photobook flow.

bicycle-blue-book.name: Bicycle Blue Book
bicycle-blue-book.summary: E-commerce platform to wholesale bicycle items in the US market.
bicycle-blue-book.responsibilities: Within a 10-engineer team on Next.js, I contributed to user account management across personal, wholesaler, seller, and company profiles; PayPal/Stripe checkout; product search and listings; authentication; add-to-cart; order placement and management. I also built admin features for order management, inventory, and user-account administration.

hate-crime-report.name: Hate Crime - Easy Report
hate-crime-report.summary: A powerful mobile tool to report hate crimes with ease and efficiency.
hate-crime-report.responsibilities: I led the team and owned delivery timeline. I base the project on React Native with the necessary libraries and built the full mobile client — nearby hospital and police search via Google Maps, emergency alerts to relatives, personal profile management, crime reporting, report export, and other features — fetching data with React Query and Axios, forms with Formik, distributed via App Center. Also built a separate React + Vite admin console with TanStack Router for managing all reports.

vity.name: Vity
vity.summary: Binary options trading platform with real-time analytics and secure execution.
vity.responsibilities: I joined a 4-engineer team and delivered the deposit/withdraw flows across multiple payment methods, rebuilt the landing page, integrated a KLine chart with optimized indicators and trade execution, and tuned the order display. I also contributed to the Next.js admin: user/nationality-based restrictions, order management, user management, payment-method management, and other features.

com-nieu-viet.name: Cơm Niêu Việt
com-nieu-viet.summary: Zalo Mini App for a Vietnamese clay-pot rice restaurant — menu, ordering & loyalty.
com-nieu-viet.responsibilities: In a 2-person team on the Zalo Mini App SDK + React stack, I built the ordering flow, customer account management, product listings, and bank-transfer payment handling — fetching data with React Query and managing shared state with Recoil.

xlvphc.name: XLVPHC - Sóc Trăng
xlvphc.summary: Mobile app for Soc Trang police to manage administrative & criminal violations.
xlvphc.responsibilities: I bootstrapped the project base with React Native and the supporting library set and delivered every feature end-to-end with a 2-person team: authentication, multi-category violation management, violation statistics, lookup by personal record, and other supporting workflows.

mechanics-marketplace.name: Mechanics Marketplace
mechanics-marketplace.summary: Marketplace website & mobile app for the auto repair industry.
mechanics-marketplace.responsibilities: Within a 3-engineer team, I built the landing/home pages with Pug.js paired with Node.js for server-side rendering, then owned the admin dashboard end-to-end — order management, customer account management, goods/services catalog, and other supporting features — using React and MobX for state.

shining-star-2019.desc: Recognized for outstanding contribution and leadership.

project-2018.desc: Awarded for the Bicycle Blue Book project.

project-2019.desc: Awarded for the Bicycle Blue Book project.

Contact.title: Have a project in mind?
Contact.subtitle: I'm open to leadership roles, contract work, and interesting front-end challenges.
